TextENGNew: "Ooishi-saaan, there's something I need to tell you~!!"
"Well now. What might Ryuugu-san want to talk to me about?"
"Watch your back, Cloud!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11256. This might be a trap to pick us off one by one!"

"Nfu fu fu! I'll be on my guard, of course.@k@|@y@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1016. Let's see what they're trying to pull at this late stage.@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1017. K, just relax and enjoy some sunbathing.@k@|@y@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1018. Tommy, Irii -- I'll leave K's protection to you."
"Sure, leave it to us!!"
"Coach, Coach.@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1076. Actually, I need a word with you."
"Hm? What is it, Satoko-chan?"
"And, Mr. Tomitake~?"
"Hmm? What do you need, Mion-chan?"
"Wh...what the?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11258. Why are all three of them being called away separately?"
changeReason: New changes "you" to "them" and "one after another" to "separately" (matching 別々に), correctly reflecting that Keiichi is observing the situation rather than addressing the three directly.

TextENGNew: "All right, here I am.@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1020. What did you want to discuss?"
"Well, you see...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1076. We actually arrived at the pool at nine this morning."
"Nine AM...?@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1022. But doesn't the pool open at ten?"
"Um... today was a special day, so they opened an hour early."
"...Is that true?"
"She's obviously lying."
"But if that's the case, then... hold on.@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1024. That would mean the three-hour window for the Ladies' Man magic has already passed!"
"Keiichi-san is lying and deceiving you all because he wants to keep the magic all to himself!"

"I-...is that true?!@k@vS23/10/VTH_irie1039. We swore an oath to share the Ladies' Man Trunks and walk the path to irresistibility together...@k@vS23/10/VTH_irie1040. ...You're telling me that oath was nothing but a lie?!"
"...And there's more.@k@vS23/05/VTH_rika1080. There's only enough magic left in those trunks for one more person to use."
"Wh-what?! Then that means..."
""""After one more person wears them, the magic will be gone for good?!?!""""
"Nfu fu fu...@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1027. I'm finally starting to see the full picture here..."
"...So what you're saying is... if I want to realize my dream of world maid reform, all for me and me alone, I need to get my hands on those Ladies' Man Trunks before Tommy and Cloud do...?"
"I see...@k@vS23/08/VTH_tomi1024. If that's how things stand, it changes everything...!"
"...It changes everything. Nipah~☆."
"Rika-san,@k@vS23/10/VTH_irie1044. from this point forward, everything that happens is a matter for the Soul Brothers to settle among themselves."
"So please,@k@vS23/11/VTH_oishi1029. leave what comes next to us."
"O-okay, we'll leave it to you!@k@|@y@vS23/02/VTH_rena1079. So please... take care of Keiichi-kun's trunks for us!"
The three of them turned on their heels and fixed their gazes on Keiichi's trunks with steely determination...!!
"Hey, what's wrong, you three?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11260. What did they say to you?"
"I-is it just my imagination...@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11262. or do the three of you look kind of pale...?"
All three were silent.@k@r...But a fierce resolve burned in their eyes.
...Keiichi could instinctively sense@k@rthat whatever they'd resolved to do@k@rwas going to be very, very bad for him...
"...K.@k@vS23/08/VTH_tomi1027. Soul Brothers are brothers in spirit.@k@vS23/08/VTH_tomi1028. We share all our dreams, our joy, our pain, and our sorrow!"
"That's right.@k@vS23/10/VTH_irie1047. So whoever wins or loses, we shall weep together and rejoice together...!!"
"But it's only natural for a Soul Brother to want to claim all the benefits for himself."

"...Wh-what's gotten into you guys, suddenly saying all these serious things?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11264. What on earth did they tell you...?@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11265. And... why are you all staring at my trunks like that...?@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11266. ...D-don't tell me..."
""""Those trunks are miiiiiiine!!!""""
"AAAAAAAAHHHHH!!!"
The Soul Brothers who had been so dependable just moments ago were now his enemies!! Keiichi had sensed something was off, but outright betrayal was beyond anything he'd imagined!!
The three mighty Soul Brothers pounced on poor Keiichi, and like a precision combat team, they had him stark naked in mere milliseconds...
"NOOOOO! You perveeerts!!!"
"Whooooa, I'll be taking those trunks!!"
"Don't you think the Ladies' Man magic would best suit me, the most elegant of the Soul Brothers?!"
"Not a chance!@k@vS23/08/VTH_tomi1031. Let's settle this the old-fashioned way -- body against body, no words needed!"
Tomitake, Ooishi, and Irie@k@rwere now locked in a scuffle@k@rover the trunks that had been on Keiichi just moments ago.
...Keiichi, cast aside like an afterthought,@k@rwrapped a mercifully offered towel around his waist@k@rand wept bitterly,@rlike a gambler who'd lost everything in a single hand.@k@|@y@r@r...The end.
